title: Drive Organization Interview
description: 30 questions to align on the digital estate file organization project. Covers indexes, dedup strategy, source of truth, Supabase upload, legal priorities, and automation preferences.

questions.text: Are the 10 index spreadsheets in 03_DATA/ALL INDEXES ON ALL LOCATIONS the ONLY indexes?
options: There are others I haven't added

questions.text: Do any of the existing indexes include file checksums or hashes?
What should happen to confirmed duplicate files?
When duplicates exist across multiple sources, which copy should be the keeper?
Should near-duplicates (same name, different size) be flagged too?
Any additional context on your dedup strategy or special files to protect?
Is OneDrive DOMAINS (~/DOMAINS/) confirmed as the current staging area for organized files?
Are there files on BIGRED (external drive) that MUST be copied to OneDrive before anything else?
options: Yes, critical files need copying first
Not sure, need to check BIGRED

questions.text: Is the FIVE9 COMBINED folder (141GB in iCloud) being migrated or left in place?
options: Leave in iCloud, just index it

questions.text: Should Google Drive files be pulled down to OneDrive or kept in Google Drive?
options: Keep in Google Drive, just index

questions.text: Are the 2 SSDs currently accessible or still detached?
Do any machines (WORKHORSE, ADMIN, QUICKS) have unique files not in any cloud sync?
options: Yes, each has unique local files
Everything is synced to cloud already

questions.text: Is the Supabase project (fifybuzwfaegloijrmqb) ready for storage bucket creation?
Should Supabase buckets be public or private?
Preferred bucket structure - one bucket per domain or fewer large buckets?
options: One big bucket with folder structure

questions.text: Upload priority - which files go to Supabase first?
options: Smallest files first for quick wins

questions.text: Do you need Supabase SQL index tables queryable from Claude Code?
Any Supabase storage limits or cost concerns to be aware of?
Is US v. Redmond 24-cr-376 the primary legal case driving urgency?
Are the 696K Everlaw discovery files the main dataset for federal case analysis?
options: Yes but there are also SSD files to reconcile
Everlaw is one of several sources
Not sure of the exact count

questions.text: What format are the Everlaw discovery exports in?
Are there specific date ranges, people, or entities to prioritize in document search?
Is there a civil litigation running alongside the federal case?
Should legal documents be tagged with case numbers in the index?
Are Gmail mbox exports already downloaded and ready to parse?
How many GoDaddy email mailboxes need extraction?
For the reserve/holdback email search - what processors should we search for?
Any other processors or search terms for the reserve email search?
Should extracted emails be stored as individual files or combined archives?
Date range for reserve/holdback email search?
